title: Update main branch to reflect 4.1.0 release
body: Add release notes, bump the version the README points to, and set development version to 4.2.0-dev. No ci:docs to make sure the last bit doesn't break our tests, like 4.1.0 did (we should have fixed that, but it doesn't hurt to check...)

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@flouthoc could you add the podman build features added to release notes, specifically --output and perhaps others.
@rhatdan Sure, Do I need to add in a followup or are we looking in the same PR.

@mheon Would it be possible to add these to release notes now or is it too late

```
podman build: added support for populating TARGETPLATFORM,TARGETOS,TARGETARCH and TARGETVARIANT automatically from --platform.
podman build: add support for custom build output with --output, allows end users to export build artifacts to host filesystem.
podman build: set the actual hostname in build containers instead of localhost.
podman build: allow creating manifest-list from images in local storage.
podman build, podman commit: allow removing default identity labels.
podman build: generate build container hostname under HOST_NAME_MAX.
podman build: `build` command now includes a `--env` option to complement its `--unsetenv` option.
pdoamn build: default value of the `io.buildah.version` label can now be overridden at the `podman build` command line using the `--label` option.
podman build: `build` commands now accepts `--os-version` and `--os-feature` flags for setting the corresponding fields in an image's configuration.
podman build: `--mount-type=cache` must support locking external cache store.
podman build: allow --no-cache and --layers so build cache can be overrided.
podman build:  Add support for inline FROM --platform= within Containerfile/Dockerfile

Fixes:
podman build: Process ARG values correctly in `FROM` statements for builds without `--layer=false`.
podman build: build should accept at most one arg.
podman build: docker builds must inherit healthconfig from baseImage if any and new build does not overrides.
```

> @flouthoc could you add the podman build features added to release notes, specifically --output and perhaps others.

@rhatdan Added notes above which are introduced by buildah but release is already out there this would cause discrepancy between the release notes for `4.1.0` and release notes on `podman` for main branch. cc @mheon
